LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT AARON WING NG'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-25-624488 WITH CASE CGC-25-623839 IS GRANTED. MARIO ALBERTO RONQUILLO V. AARON HON WING NG ET AL., CASE NO. CGC-25-623839, IS CONSOLIDATED WITH NOOR MOHAMMAD MOHMAND V. AARON HON WING NG ET AL., CASE NO. CGC-25-624488, FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL. RONQUILLO V. HON WING NG, CASE NO. CGC-25-623839, SHALL BE THE LEAD CASE. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)
